summary: Tested all 4 bug fixes for Pet Life OS sprint: (1) Services mobile pet selector horizontal scroll, (2) CelebrateHero soul chips white text, (3) PillarPageLayout floating Concierge button mobile vs desktop label, (4) Regression check on Celebrate/Services/Care/Go pages. All 4 fixes confirmed working.

issues: CelebrateMobilePage.jsx line 396 still uses flexWrap:'wrap' for the pet selector (8+ pets will wrap into a grid). Services was fixed to horizontal scroll, but Celebrate mobile was NOT fixed in this sprint. Low priority but inconsistent with the fix applied to Services.

test_1_services_mobile_pet_selector.details: ServicesMobilePage.jsx renders at /services with 390px viewport. Pet selector container has overflow-x:auto, display:flex, flex-wrap:nowrap. 8 pet buttons (Mojo, Mystique, Bruno, Buddy...) with borderRadius:999px and whiteSpace:nowrap. Buttons do NOT wrap. Confirmed horizontal scroll row below title.

test_2_celebrate_soul_chips_white_text.details: CelebrateHero renders at /celebrate-soul (desktop). 3 tdc-chip-dark chips found: '🚫Allergy: chicken, beef', '⭐Loves: Salmon · car rides', '✦Playful · Loyal · The Social Butterfly'. All have computed color: rgba(255,255,255,0.9) AND inline color: rgba(255,255,255,0.9). Confirmed white text. The .tdc-chip-dark class sets rgba(255,255,255,0.55) via CSS variable, but the inline style color:rgba(255,255,255,0.90) overrides it correctly.

test_3_floating_concierge_button.details: data-testid='concierge-builder-float-btn' verified on multiple pages. Mobile (390px) on /celebrate: text='✦ C°' ✅. Desktop (1280px) on /celebrate: text='✦ Concierge® Requests' ✅. Mobile (390px) on /care: text='✦ C°' ✅. PillarPageLayout.jsx lines 476-480 correctly use window.innerWidth < 768 check.

test_4_regression_check.details: All 4 pages load with status 200 and meaningful content. /celebrate (1280px): 9265 chars body text. /services (390px): 2498 chars. /care (390px): 6833 chars. /go (390px): 5103 chars. No error boundaries or crash errors found.

action_items: MINOR: CelebrateMobilePage.jsx line 396 still uses flexWrap:'wrap' for pet selector. With 8+ pets this wraps to a grid (same issue that was fixed for Services). Consider changing to: overflowX:'auto', flexWrap:'nowrap', flexShrink:0 per button — matching the Services fix pattern.
critical_code_review_comments: CelebrateMobilePage.jsx line 396: pet selector still uses flexWrap:'wrap' + justifyContent:'flex-end' — this creates a multi-row grid when user has 8+ pets. Services fix (ServicesMobilePage.jsx lines 114-126) should be applied here too for consistency.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 sprint fixes verified: (1) Services mobile horizontal scroll pet selector at lines 113-126 of ServicesMobilePage.jsx, (2) Soul chips white text in CelebrateHero.jsx via tdc-chip-dark class + inline rgba(255,255,255,0.90), (3) Floating button shows '✦ C°' on mobile / '✦ Concierge® Requests' on desktop via window.innerWidth < 768 check in PillarPageLayout.jsx, (4) All 4 pillar pages load clean. Outstanding: CelebrateMobilePage.jsx line 396 still has flexWrap:'wrap' for pet selector (inconsistent with Services fix). Credentials: dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123.

rca_of_issues.celebrate_mobile_pet_grid: CelebrateMobilePage.jsx line 396 uses flexWrap:'wrap' — no corresponding fix was applied in this sprint. To fix: change to display:'flex', overflowX:'auto', WebkitOverflowScrolling:'touch', scrollbarWidth:'none', and add flexShrink:0 + whiteSpace:'nowrap' on buttons, matching ServicesMobilePage.jsx lines 114-126.
